fields.title: Prompt Engineering Strategies for Knowledge Management
fields.summary: Technical report evaluating prompt engineering techniques for AI-assisted knowledge management.
fields.abstract: Investigates structured prompting approaches, prompt templates, contextual grounding and response optimization for large language models within knowledge management systems.

fields.title: Artificial Intelligence Adoption in Healthcare: Opportunities and Challenges
fields.summary: White paper examining the application of artificial intelligence within healthcare systems.
fields.abstract: Discusses diagnostic support, clinical decision systems, workflow automation, ethical considerations and implementation barriers associated with AI adoption in healthcare.

fields.title: Evaluating Large Language Models for Professional Knowledge Support
fields.summary: Research exploring the strengths and limitations of large language models in professional environments.
fields.abstract: Evaluates response quality, factual consistency, reasoning capability, hallucination risks and practical use cases for LLMs supporting healthcare, education and software engineering.

fields.title: Responsible AI Governance Framework for Knowledge Platforms
fields.summary: Framework for integrating responsible AI principles into digital knowledge platforms.
fields.abstract: Examines governance mechanisms addressing fairness, transparency, accountability, privacy, explainability and human oversight when deploying AI-powered knowledge systems.
